data.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section (new agents, agent routing), quick reference (new agents), brainstorm/preplanning/sprint workflow descriptions.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of new planning gates and their integration points.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md updates (architecture, quick reference), agent routing docs
- OUT: New documentation files (only update existing docs)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md architecture section documents all new agents (feasibility-reviewer, red-team-reviewer, blue-team-filter, completion-verifier) and their roles
- When this story is complete, quick reference is updated with new agent names and dispatch patterns
- When this story is complete, brainstorm, preplanning, sprint workflow descriptions reflect new gates

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent. High confidence means clear evidence from the codebase or ticket context — not inference or reasonable assumption. When in doubt, stop and ask rather than guess.
